changelog: add a prior-updates viewer beside the update checker
keep a downloadable update history with an offline packaged fallback
stop the view-changes dialog from automatically selecting all text
add trailing-star sender exclusion rules to word catcher
name* still catches name in chat but ignores messages sent by players named name*
fix custom MP3 notification playback
show the actual playback error when testing an invalid custom MP3
add the two-minute started phase after storage auction inspection
add configurable default or custom MP3 alerts for storage and PM catcher
add word catcher with unlimited words or phrases, saved matches, and notifications
ignore FPS limiter and command keybinds while SA-MP chat input is open
track chat focus from SA-MP input open and close events
consume held hotkeys when chat closes to prevent deferred actions
integrate the loadout picker into the main AC Multitool hook
fix F2 loadout detection after the money formatting integration
remove the separate loadout ASI and INI requirement
integrate money comma formatting into the main AC Multitool hook
remove the separate money commas ASI and INI requirement
keep the game window procedure chain intact when the launcher closes
restore GTA cursor and scoreboard control after the launcher closes
only restore GTA control flags when looker mode actually applied them
restore looker camera speed adjustment with the mouse wheel
improve hook reattachment after restarting the game
keep fullscreen chat pumping and normal window messages unchanged
capture SA-MP chat through the 0.3.7-R5 chat entry hook
keep pumping SA-MP networking while a fullscreen session is alt-tabbed
remember fullscreen state across temporary alt-tab window reports
add the 1 minute 30 second inspection period to storage auction countdowns
show clean version text without Git metadata
show the version in the window title and header
